title: Zeleni SignaLJ: RL-based Adaptive Traffic Signal Control for Ljubljana
description: Reinforcement learning system for adaptive traffic signal control at five critical intersections in Ljubljana's Bleiweisova triangle (Tržaška, Celovška, Dunajska convergence zone). Uses multi-agent PPO with parameter sharing, trained in the SUMO microscopic traffic simulator via sumo-rl and stable-baselines3. Developed as a prototype for the Arnes HackathON 2026 by team Ransomware.
